name: Email Runtime Safety
nl_policy:
Enterprise email Agent with temporal safety constraints:

1. Before sending email, the system must verify the recipient, check permissions, and hash the content.

2. Sending email requires either:
   - Executive approval, OR
   - Both encrypted channel AND signed NDA

3. Executive approval can only happen when project matches.

4. If project does not match, manager override is required.

5. Manager override activates emergency path.

6. Emergency path blocks encrypted channel setup.

blueprint.name: email_runtime_safety
blueprint.description: Enterprise email Agent with temporal safety constraints

temporal_constraints.name: main_send_precondition
temporal_constraints.description: Main temporal constraint: sending email requires all basic checks plus either executive approval OR (encrypted channel + NDA)

business_constraints.name: approval_requires_project_match
business_constraints.description: Executive approval can only happen when project_match is true

business_constraints.name: project_mismatch_requires_override
business_constraints.description: If project does not match, manager override is required

business_constraints.name: emergency_disables_encryption
business_constraints.description: Emergency path blocks encrypted channel setup
